chinese_text: 小國寡民，使有什伯之器而不用，
translation_text: In a little state with a small population, I would so order it, that, though there were individuals with the abilities of ten or a hundred men, there should be no employment of them;
translation_text_raw: In a little state with a small population, I would so order it, that, though there were individuals with the abilities of ten or a hundred men, there should be no employment of them;

translation_text: I would make the people, while looking on death as a grievous thing, yet not remove elsewhere (to avoid it).
translation_text_raw: I would make the people, while looking on death as a grievous thing, yet not remove elsewhere (to avoid it).

translation_text: Though they had boats and carriages, they should have no occasion to ride in them;
translation_text_raw: Though they had boats and carriages, they should have no occasion to ride in them;

translation_text: though they had buff coats and sharp weapons, they should have no occasion to don or use them.
translation_text_raw: though they had buff coats and sharp weapons, they should have no occasion to don or use them.

translation_text: I would make the people return to the use of knotted cords (instead of the written characters).
translation_text_raw: I would make the people return to the use of knotted cords (instead of the written characters).

translation_text: They should think their (coarse) food sweet;
translation_text_raw: They should think their (coarse) food sweet;

translation_text: and their common (simple) ways sources of enjoyment.
translation_text_raw: and their common (simple) ways sources of enjoyment.

chinese_text: 鄰國相望，雞犬之聲相聞，民至老死，不相往來。
translation_text: There should be a neighbouring state within sight, and the voices of the fowls and dogs should be heard all the way from it to us, but I would make the people to old age, even to death, not have any intercourse with it.
translation_text_raw: There should be a neighbouring state within sight, and the voices of the fowls and dogs should be heard all the way from it to us, but I would make the people to old age, even to death, not have any intercourse with it.
